Package org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.search.model

Record Class SearchMetadata

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.search.model.SearchMetadata
public record SearchMetadata(Map<String,FieldStats> stats, List<String> didYouMean, String autoCorrectQuery, String redirectUrl, String redirectQuery, Campaign campaign, String categoryName) extends Record

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SearchMetadata(Map<String,FieldStats> stats, List<String> didYouMean, String autoCorrectQuery, String redirectUrl, String redirectQuery)

      public SearchMetadata(Map<String,FieldStats> stats, List<String> didYouMean, String autoCorrectQuery, String redirectUrl, String redirectQuery, Campaign campaign)
      Backwards-compatible 6-arg constructor (no categoryName).

    • SearchMetadata

      public SearchMetadata(Map<String,FieldStats> stats, List<String> didYouMean, String autoCorrectQuery, String redirectUrl, String redirectQuery)
      Backwards-compatible 5-arg constructor (no campaign, no categoryName).

    • SearchMetadata

      public SearchMetadata(Map<String,FieldStats> stats, List<String> didYouMean, String autoCorrectQuery, String redirectUrl, String redirectQuery, Campaign campaign, String categoryName)
      Creates an instance of a SearchMetadata record class.
      Parameters:
      stats - the value for the stats record component
      didYouMean - the value for the didYouMean record component
      autoCorrectQuery - the value for the autoCorrectQuery record component
      redirectUrl - the value for the redirectUrl record component
      redirectQuery - the value for the redirectQuery record component
      campaign - the value for the campaign record component
      categoryName - the value for the categoryName record component

  • Method Details

    • empty

      public static SearchMetadata empty()

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
